brief: Domain spotlight (playstyle / strategy) for the Infernus realm in VOIDBORN. Explain how Infernus decks win: unit roles (forge demons, lava elementals, armor, burn, chain lords, ash hounds), curve tips, synergies, and when to pick this realm for ranked. Visual identity: volcanic forge, ember-lit hellscape, demonic smiths, lava rivers, crimson and charcoal. Practical TCG advice without inventing fake card names — speak in archetypes (tanks, burn, flying, etc.). Instagram hooks players who main Infernus; Facebook longer strategy discussion; Discord bullet tips + [Play VOIDBORN](https://voidborn.fun).

image.prompt: A square, cinematic wide shot of a massive, dark fantasy volcanic forge at the edge of a jagged cliff, overflowing with flowing rivers of bright orange molten lava, deep crimson and charcoal color palette, ember particles floating in the air, hyper-realistic, dark atmospheric lighting, no text.
